objective: Fix GitHub #175: expose allowPrivateNetwork opt-in across GUI/API/CLI — single PABCD cycle

workPhases.title: Expose allowPrivateNetwork across all four blocked surfaces

tasks.title: Server PATCH field mask: add allowPrivateNetwork to management-api.ts
CLI: add --allow-private-network flag to ocx provider add
GUI payload: add allowPrivateNetwork to ProviderPayload + form builder
GUI AddProviderModal: warned toggle for local/custom providers
GUI ProviderSettings: toggle for existing providers via PATCH
GUI JSON editor: surface server error body on save failure
i18n locale keys for the toggle (en/ko/zh/de)
Tests: PATCH field mask + CLI flag round-trip

criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test server-auth 'allows private-network destinations only with explicit opt-in': HTTP 200, saved.providers.allowPrivateNetwork === true [server-auth.test.ts:693-721]

criteria.scenario: PATCH /api/providers?name=X with allowPrivateNetwork:true succeeds and persists
criteria.expectedEvidence: curl probe HTTP 200 + GET shows flag true
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test server-auth 'PATCH can enable allowPrivateNetwork and then change baseUrl to localhost': POST public→PATCH flag true (200)→PATCH baseUrl localhost (200)→GET confirms allowPrivateNetwork:true + baseUrl contains 127.0.0.1 [server-auth.test.ts:755-800]

criteria.scenario: ocx provider add --allow-private-network with localhost baseUrl succeeds
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun src/cli/index.ts provider add issue175-cli-verify --adapter openai-chat --base-url http://localhost:1/v1 --allow-private-network --json → exit 0, jq config.json shows {adapter,baseUrl,allowPrivateNetwork:true}. Provider removed after verification.

criteria.scenario: Add Provider modal toggle sends allowPrivateNetwork:true in POST body
criteria.capturedEvidence: gui/src/provider-payload.ts: ProviderPayloadForm has allowPrivateNetwork?:boolean, buildProviderPayload() includes if(form.allowPrivateNetwork){provider.allowPrivateNetwork=true}. AddProviderModal.tsx has checkbox wired to form state, visible when isCustom||isLocal. GUI build+lint pass per Ampere worker evidence.

criteria.scenario: Workspace Settings exposes toggle using PATCH endpoint
criteria.expectedEvidence: Code inspection: ProviderSettings sends allowPrivateNetwork in PATCH
criteria.capturedEvidence: gui/src/components/provider-workspace/ProviderSettings.tsx: useState for allowPrivateNetwork, wired to dirty check, included in save patch. types.ts ProviderUpdatePatch has allowPrivateNetwork?:boolean. catalog.ts WorkspaceItem has allowPrivateNetwork?:boolean.

criteria.scenario: Classic JSON editor surfaces actual server error message on save failure
criteria.expectedEvidence: Code inspection: error body displayed instead of generic message
criteria.capturedEvidence: gui/src/pages/Providers.tsx saveConfig(): changed from notify(t('prov.saveFailed')) to const d=await res.json().catch(()=>({})); notify(d.error||t('prov.saveFailed')). Server 405 body now displayed.
bun test tests/destination-policy-resolved.test.ts: 17 pass 0 fail 19 expect() [13ms]. bun test tests/router.test.ts: 19 pass 0 fail 44 expect() [27ms].

criteria.scenario: New tests cover PATCH field mask and CLI flag
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test with new test names pass
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test server-auth --test-name-pattern 'private-network|allowPrivateNetwork|PATCH can enable': 4 pass 0 fail 11 expect() [202ms]. Tests: (1) rejects without opt-in, (2) allows with opt-in, (3) PATCH enable+use localhost, (4) PATCH rejects disabling while private.
